message:
style(aws): align aws-dry-run with aws\b prefix style for consistency

The `aws-dry-run` pattern was the lone holdout still using `aws\s+`.
Its `.*` already absorbed global flags so behavior was correct,
but every other pattern in the file now uses `aws\b` to allow
wrapper tools (`aws-vault`) and to stay away from the `AWS_PROFILE`
env-var prefix. Keep the file uniform: `aws\b.*--dry-run`.
